name: Beef and Tequila Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Meat (boneless chuck, tip, or round)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut beef into 1-inch pieces.
2. Coat the beef with flour.
3. Heat oil in a 10-inch skillet until hot.
4. Cook and stir the beef in oil over medium heat until brown. Remove the beef with a slotted spoon and drain.
5. Cook and stir the onion and bacon in the same skillet until the bacon is crisp.
6. Stir in the beef and remaining ingredients (tequila, tomato juice, cilantro, salt, garbanzo beans, tomatoes, and garlic).
7. Heat to boiling; reduce heat.
8. Cover and simmer until the beef is tender, about 1 hour.
